mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_metrics_agg_1m ( instance_id, database_id, collected_at, total_queries, select_queries, insert_queries, update_queries, delete_queries, other_queries, avg_execution_time_ms, max_execution_time_ms, avg_planning_time_ms, total_io_blocks, avg_io_blocks, slow_query_count, current_cpu_usage_percent, current_memory_usage_percent, current_disk_io_usage_percent, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.databaseId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.totalQueries}, #{item.selectQueries}, #{item.insertQueries}, #{item.updateQueries}, #{item.deleteQueries}, #{item.otherQueries}, #{item.avgExecutionTimeMs}, #{item.maxExecutionTimeMs}, #{item.avgPlanningTimeMs}, #{item.totalIoBlocks}, #{item.avgIoBlocks}, #{item.slowQueryCount}, #{item.currentCpuUsagePercent}, #{item.currentMemoryUsagePercent}, #{item.currentDiskIoUsagePercent}, NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, database_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_queries = EXCLUDED.total_queries, select_queries = EXCLUDED.select_queries, insert_queries = EXCLUDED.insert_queries, update_queries = EXCLUDED.update_queries, delete_queries = EXCLUDED.delete_queries, other_queries = EXCLUDED.other_queries, avg_execution_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_execution_time_ms, max_execution_time_ms = EXCLUDED.max_execution_time_ms, avg_planning_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_planning_time_ms, total_io_blocks = EXCLUDED.total_io_blocks, avg_io_blocks = EXCLUDED.avg_io_blocks, slow_query_count = EXCLUDED.slow_query_count, current_cpu_usage_percent = EXCLUDED.current_cpu_usage_percent, current_memory_usage_percent = EXCLUDED.current_memory_usage_percent, current_disk_io_usage_percent = EXCLUDED.current_disk_io_usage_percent, created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, select_queries AS selectQueries, insert_queries AS insertQueries, update_queries AS updateQueries, delete_queries AS deleteQueries FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, avg_execution_time_ms AS avgExecutionTimeMs FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, avg_io_blocks AS avgIoBlocks FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, slow_query_count AS slowQueryCount FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId,
CAST(COALESCE(SUM(total_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS totalQueries, CAST(AVG(avg_execution_time_ms) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS avgExecutionTimeMs, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(slow_query_count), 0) AS INTEGER) AS slowQueryCount,
CAST(COALESCE(SUM(insert_queries + update_queries + delete_queries), 0) / 300.0 AS INTEGER) AS currentTps, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(total_queries), 0) / 300.0 AS INTEGER) AS currentQps, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(total_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS activeSessions,
CAST(COALESCE(SUM(select_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS selectCount, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(insert_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS insertCount, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(update_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS updateCount, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(delete_queries), 0) AS INTEGER) AS deleteCount,
AVG(current_cpu_usage_percent) AS currentCpuUsagePercent, AVG(current_memory_usage_percent) AS currentMemoryUsagePercent, AVG(current_disk_io_usage_percent) AS currentDiskIoUsagePercent,
MAX(created_at) AS createdAt, '최근 5분 기준' AS timeRange
FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY instance_id, database_id

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, total_queries AS totalQueries, select_queries AS selectQueries, insert_queries AS insertQueries, update_queries AS updateQueries, delete_queries AS deleteQueries, other_queries AS otherQueries, avg_execution_time_ms AS avgExecutionTimeMs, max_execution_time_ms AS maxExecutionTimeMs, avg_planning_time_ms AS avgPlanningTimeMs, total_io_blocks AS totalIoBlocks, avg_io_blocks AS avgIoBlocks, slow_query_count AS slowQueryCount, created_at AS createdAt FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '${hours} hours' ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT r.query_metric_id AS queryMetricId, r.instance_id AS instanceId, r.database_id AS databaseId, r.collected_at AS collectedAt,
r.query_text AS queryText, r.short_query AS shortQuery, r.query_type AS queryType, r.execution_count AS executionCount,
r.execution_time_ms AS avgExecutionTimeMs, r.planning_time_ms AS avgPlanningTimeMs, r.io_blocks AS avgIoBlocks, r.cpu_usage_percent AS avgCpuUsagePercent, r.memory_usage_mb AS avgMemoryUsageMb,
r.created_at AS createdAt
FROM query_metrics_raw r WHERE r.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND r.database_id = #{databaseId} AND r.collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 hour'
AND r.cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.cpu_usage_percent DESC
AND r.memory_usage_mb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.memory_usage_mb DESC
AND r.io_blocks IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.io_blocks DESC
AND r.execution_time_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.execution_time_ms DESC
AND r.cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.cpu_usage_percent DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
